description_long: This is a large, multi-level bungalow with a Mediterranean or Spanish Revival architectural style, featuring tan stucco walls and a complex, multi-tiered brown tiled roof. The structure includes several prominent towers and protruding sections, with numerous arched and rectangular windows distributed across all sides. The landscaping around the building is lush, with green shrubbery and a sloped terrain, and there is a paved driveway or entrance area visible. A notable feature is the modern pool area with a blue-tiled pool and a small waterfall, located adjacent to the main building. The bungalow also includes balconies and covered walkways, enhancing its luxurious and expansive appearance. The overall design suggests a high-end residential property with multiple access points and outdoor amenities.
description: A large, Mediterranean-style multi-story bungalow with tan stucco walls, brown tiled roofs, towers, and a modern pool area. Features lush landscaping, numerous windows, balconies, and covered walkways.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, a prominent tower, and the pool area with a waterfall feature on the left.
description_view_1: This angle shows the lush landscaping, a smaller tower, and the front garden area, with the main entrance partially visible.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the length of the building, the extensive greenery, and the garage or lower-level entrance.
description_view_3: This rear view showcases the pool area, waterfall, and the back facade with multiple windows and balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and tower windows
